### Selected Publications

<ul style="list-style-type: none;">
<li><strong>E. Morales-Cuadrado</strong>, L. Chung, S. Kousik and S. Coogan, "RTD-RAX: Fast, Safe Trajectory Planning for Systems under Unknown Disturbances." Joint Submission to 2026 Modeling, Estimation and Control Conference (MECC) and ASME Letters in Dynamic Systems and Control (ALDSC). <em>(under revision)</em></li>
<li><strong>E. Morales-Cuadrado</strong>, L. Baird, Y. Wardi and S. Coogan, "Lightweight Tracking Control for Computationally Constrained Aerial Systems with the Newton-Raphson Method." Submitted to IEEE Transactions on Control Systems Technology, 2026. <em>(under revision)</em> <a href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2508.14185"><em>preprint available.</em></a></li>
<li>L. Baird, <strong>E. Morales-Cuadrado</strong>, and S. Coogan, "Runtime Assurance for Uncertain Systems from Interval Signal Temporal Logic." Submitted to IFAC Nonlinear Analysis: Hybrid Systems (NAHS), 2025. <em>(under revision)</em> <a href="https://papers.ssrn.com/sol3/Delivery.cfm?abstractid=6168587"><em>preprint available.</em></a></li>
<li><strong>E. Morales-Cuadrado</strong>, C. Llanes, Y. Wardi and S. Coogan, "Newton-Raphson Flow for Aggressive Quadrotor Tracking Control." <a href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.11197"><em>2024 American Control Conference (ACC)</em></a></li>
</ul>
